name: neon-agent-framework
description: Public-safe Neon-style agent runtime framework with onboarding, approvals, Discord wiring, and daemon tooling.

scripts.smoke: rm -rf ./.tmp/smoke-state ./.tmp/smoke-workspace && node dist/cli.js --help && node dist/cli.js onboard --non-interactive --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --workspace ./.tmp/smoke-workspace --name smoke-agent --provider none && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");for(const f of ["OPERATING.md","channels/discord-operating-floor.md","agents/handoff-contract.md"]){if(!fs.existsSync("./.tmp/smoke-workspace/"+f)){throw new Error("missing starter "+f);}}' && rm ./.tmp/smoke-workspace/OPERATING.md ./.tmp/smoke-workspace/channels/discord-operating-floor.md ./.tmp/smoke-workspace/agents/handoff-contract.md && node dist/cli.js doctor --json --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --fix --non-interactive && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");for(const f of ["OPERATING.md","channels/discord-operating-floor.md","agents/handoff-contract.md"]){if(!fs.existsSync("./.tmp/smoke-workspace/"+f)){throw new Error("doctor fix did not restore "+f);}}' && node dist/cli.js blueprint && node dist/cli.js start --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --once && node dist/cli.js run --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state "say ok" && node dist/cli.js memory add --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --title "first memory" --body "owned memory search works" --tags smoke && node dist/cli.js memory search --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --query "owned" --json && node dist/cli.js task add --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state "write first owned task" && node dist/cli.js task list --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --json && node dist/cli.js start --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --prompt "say ok from start" && node dist/cli.js daemon render --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state && rm -rf ./.tmp/cli-state ./.tmp/cli-workspace && node dist/cli.js onboard --non-interactive --state-dir ./.tmp/cli-state --workspace ./.tmp/cli-workspace --name cli-smoke --provider cli --model node-echo --cli-command node --cli-args-json '["-e","process.stdout.write(process.argv[1])","{prompt}"]' && node dist/cli.js doctor --json --state-dir ./.tmp/cli-state && node dist/cli.js doctor --json --state-dir ./.tmp/cli-state --fix && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const path=require("path");const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("./.tmp/cli-state/config.json","utf8"));if(!path.isAbsolute(c.provider.command)){throw new Error("provider command is not absolute");}' && node dist/cli.js run --state-dir ./.tmp/cli-state --no-progress "cli ok" && node scripts/smoke-cli-fallback.mjs
